act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Confidentiality.—Subject to the provisions of the Right to Information
content:
89. Confidentiality.—Subject to the provisions of the Right to Information
Act, 2009 (Act No. 20 of 2009), all the information, received from any taxpayer in giving
effect to the provisions of this Act, shall be treated as confidential.
AUDIT AND INVESTIGATION
